positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a howling celestial wolf silhouette against a deep indigo and cosmic nebula backdrop. The wolf is rendered with intricate, glowing bioluminescent details along its mane and tail, forming ethereal light pathways. Complementing the wolf, incorporate stylized constellations and minimalist, abstract geometric floral elements that seem to float within the nebula. The overall style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and modern magical realism, utilizing strong line work and high contrast. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced for seamless apparel printing. Lighting should be dramatic, emanating primarily from the celestial objects, creating a mystical, luminous glow against deep, saturated midnight blues and purples. High detail, vector art quality, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, noisy, bad anatomy, text, words, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, extra limbs, messy, messy background, copyright, photorealism, 3d render, cartoonish
